questionHtml:
A kaon is made up of two quarks. What is the particle classification of a kaon?

A. Exchange boson

B. Baryon

C. Lepton

D. Meson

meta.title: A kaon is made up of two quarks. What is the particle classification of a kaon? A. Exchange boson B. Baryon C. Lepton D. Meson
